issue.title: Replace with a short issue title

user-story.as-a: Replace with the primary user or operator role.
user-story.i-want: Replace with the capability or behavior they need.
user-story.so-that: Replace with the outcome or reason this matters.

issue.premise: Replace with the framing assumptions for the work, including the intended model, relevant current behavior, and any known risks or constraints.

acceptance-criteria.criterion: Replace with a concrete, testable success condition.
Replace with another concrete, testable success condition.

review-items.item: Replace with a review check that has been completed.
Replace with a review concern or follow-up still to resolve.
